evals.prompt: Audit this agricultural Excel workbook before reanalysis. Confirm factors, three replicates, missing variables and pseudoreplication risks. Do not modify source files.
evals.expected_output: A structured data audit and analysis-readiness report.

evals.prompt: Redraw the manuscript figures in Python using the supplied palette, Times New Roman, black-edged marks, real error bars and abc significance letters; export separate panels and combined PDF/600-dpi PNG files.
evals.expected_output: Journal-ready figures plus figure QA reports without invented statistics.

evals.prompt: Audit the manuscript, figures, supplement, cover letter, data and code for immediate submission to the named journal. Remove stale-journal files from the clean package but do not alter sources.
evals.expected_output: A clean submission package, manifest and explicit remaining-risk report.
